scripts.dev:full: wrangler pages dev --proxy 5173 --port 8788 -- npm run dev
scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 execute farm2you-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute farm2you-db --local --file=migrations/0002_seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute farm2you-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute farm2you-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_seed.sql
